action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess manual steps succeeded for complementary batch (w/ dummy_action, PIL images, padded state, complementary_data+task) but full preprocess() was never tested in loop; predict.py still raises ObservationProcessorStep error (caught leading to fallback zero-action, 0.0 success, 59/60 episodes recorded). RecordingEvaluator incomplete (no proper super().__init__ with json track load, missing evaluate_single_episode override calling super per contract). Analysis: Root cause is pipeline.__call__ (vs manual steps) drops 'observation' key before ObservationProcessorStep runs for current batch; full test needed to find working input (likely needs specific nesting for RenameObservations/Language/Observation steps, PIL->tensor handling, dummy action for batch dim, both task/complementary_data). Proper subclass init+override will fix AttributeError/missing episodes and produce exact JSON. This keeps Pi0 track (no from-scratch). Decision: Update test_preprocess.py to test FULL preprocess() calls on 8 variants (PIL/tensor images, padded state, nesting combos, w/wo dummy_action); update predict.py to COMPLETE working version (full RecordingEvaluator with super init+single_episode override replicating base contract, main() parsing eval_config+track_path, batch using best format from diagnostic, improved debug, small-random fallback, chunking, delta bridge with tuned scales). Run both tests for local validation (expect full preprocess success + mock success). Next iter: submit_eval on fixed predict for first non-zero baseline.
